title: I, Yuuzhan Vong

"'''I, Yuuzhan Vong'''" is an article published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]], written by [[Daniel Wallace]]. The article collects and expands upon information on the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 2002-01-08 -->[[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]
